raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX for {$4100.00} on my Citibank credit card in two charges of approximately {$2000.00} each. 
On XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX issued a written unconditional full refund commitment of {$4100.00} with no conditions attached. I accepted on XX/XX/XXXX and returned the product on XX/XX/XXXX per the merchant 's instructions. The merchant accepted the return on XX/XX/XXXX and signed a receipt noting no damage. The merchant has not processed the refund. 
I contacted Citibank to open a billing dispute for this unprocessed merchant refund. Citibank refused to issue a case number, refused to accept my dispute by email, refused to transfer me to a XXXX XXXX, and after approximately XXXX hours on chat and phone provided no resolution. I was directed only to mail a letter. 
I am a XXXX Citibank customer with a perfect payment history. The merchant 's written refund commitment dated XX/XX/XXXX is the triggering event under FCBA 15 U.S.C. 1666. That date is 44 days ago and well within the 120-day statutory window for a billing dispute. I am requesting Citibank open a formal billing dispute and credit my account {$4100.00} for this unprocessed merchant refund.
